name: Async Delay
description: Delays execution for a specified number of seconds.
python_code:
import asyncio
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class AsyncDelayNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Async Delay"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("input_data", "any")
        self.add_input("seconds", "number")
        self.add_output("output_data", "any")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        data = inputs.get("input_data")
        delay = float(inputs.get("seconds", 1.0))
        
        # Demonstrates async non-blocking behavior
        await asyncio.sleep(delay)
        
        return {"output_data": data}

def register_node():
    return AsyncDelayNode
